commitMessage:
Add tileActiveApp action to tile windows of the active application (#1684)

Adds a new window action that tiles only windows belonging to the
currently active (foremost) app into a grid, leaving all other
windows alone. This complements the existing cascadeActiveApp action.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
